title: stelis micrantha
intro: Stelis micrantha, also known as the 'Small-flowered Stelis,' is a species of orchid plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its small, white, and star-shaped flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis micrantha include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin infections. Stelis micrantha can be prepared as a tea or a tincture, making it a versatile herb for various herbal remedies.
